name: Sky Chinafortune Holdings Group Limited
summary: Sky Chinafortune Holdings Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in property investment activities in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Property Investment, Trading of Properties and Property Related Services, and Retail Business segments. The company leases residential premises, shops, and car parks; sells properties; and offers property management and property related services. It is also involved in the retail sale of Chinese liquor and wine, and everyday items. The company was formerly known as Great China Holdings Limited and changed its name to Sky Chinafortune Holdings Group Limited in July 2019. The company was incorporated in 1965 and is based in Central, Hong Kong. Sky Chinafortune Holdings Group Limited is a subsidiary of Hopevision Group Ltd.
